2.3.0.name: FreeEQ8
2.3.0.author: Neo-VECTR
2.3.0.description: A professional-grade, free and open-source 8-band parametric EQ plugin. Linear phase, dynamic EQ, match EQ, per-band drive, band linking, M/S processing, oversampling, and a real-time spectrum analyzer.
2.3.0.changes:
FreeEQ8 v2.3.0 stable release.

Highlights:
- macOS DMG includes FreeEQ8 and ProEQ8 (VST3/AU plus FreeEQ8 Standalone)
- CI/CD fixes for macOS, Windows, and Linux builds
- Expanded Smart EQ and real-time safety/security documentation
